field_notes.body: finish_configuration has no payload fields after the Configuration packet table id on the official framed codec surface.
field_notes.terminal: Terminal status is read from each official packet INSTANCE through isTerminal().

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration finish_configuration packet framing, dispatch/decode, and terminal flags only; do not infer Configuration-to-Play runtime readiness, registry hydration, or client load completion.
